items.claim: Derrick Lewis is past his prime.
items.quote: he handled the past his prime Derrick Lewis nicely.

items.claim: Derrick Lewis was extremely slow and struggled to find his shots against Josh Hokit.
items.quote: he was just, you know, extremely slow and couldn't find shots

items.claim: Josh Hokit's wrestling was effective enough to gas out Derrick Lewis in the first round.
items.quote: Hok beat him up in the wrestling round number one, gassed him out.

items.claim: Josh Hokit possesses superior hand speed compared to Derrick Lewis.
items.quote: You saw the hand speed difference a couple times.

items.claim: Josh Hokit has the ability to roll with punches to mitigate incoming damage.
Josh Hokit entered his fight against Derrick Lewis with a hand injury.
items.quote: He came into this thing with a hand injury

items.claim: Derrick Lewis is nearing the end of his career and likely has only one fight left.
items.quote: I think he's got maybe a fight left in all honesty.

items.claim: Michael Chandler is physically declining and struggling to perform at a high level.
items.quote: it's starting to fall apart now. This was really bad.

items.claim: Michael Chandler was unable to execute takedowns against Mauricio Ruffy.
items.quote: Chandler couldn't even get a takedown attempt really on.

items.claim: Michael Chandler has lost four consecutive fights.
items.quote: Michael Chill has lost four fights in a row.
